Modal.Title: Rules
Modal.TopPositions: The top {POINTS_TABLE_LENGTH} will receive points in each event.
Modal.CountingResults: At the end of the series the final order will be decided based on the points awarded for each competitor's best {COUNTING_RESULTS} events.
Modal.PodiumCount: At the end of the series the top {PODIUM_COUNT} highest-ranked people will receive certificates and Cuboss giftcards.
